---
title: "USGS-04087170"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "..")
```

## Location

- **Latitude:** 43.024
- **Longitude:** -87.898
- **Role:** Holdout
- **Samples:** 410

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-site-map-USGS-04087170
from _scripts.figures import make_site_location_map

fig = make_site_location_map(
    Path("../dashboard_data/site_metadata.parquet"),
    "USGS-04087170",
)
fig.show()
```

## Observed vs Predicted

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-site-detail-USGS-04087170
from _scripts.figures import make_site_detail

fig = make_site_detail(
    Path("../dashboard_data/per_reading.parquet"),
    "USGS-04087170",
)
fig.show()
```

## Site Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| R² (NSE) | -0.160 |
| MAPE | 52.1% |
| Bias | 4.8% |
| Within 2x | 0.638 |
| Samples | 410 |

## Rating Curve

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-rating-curve-USGS-04087170
from _scripts.figures import make_rating_curve

fig = make_rating_curve(
    Path("../dashboard_data/per_reading.parquet"),
    "USGS-04087170",
)
fig.show()
```

[Back to Site Explorer](../sites.html)
